title: moderation.decision_issued / moderation.decision_enforced event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.9. Produced by epd2_moderation_service.events.decision_state_payload, shared verbatim by build_decision_issued_event (moderation.decision_issued) and build_decision_enforced_event (moderation.decision_enforced) - verified by reading events.py, both call the identical payload function. Unlike ModerationCase/Appeal, there is no separate 'minimal' variant here: ModerationDecision is immutable and already small, so its complete state is the natural event payload for both event types. effective_until is nullable.
